notes: 9 open Copilot PRs found (#29270, #29269, #29264, #29259, #29257, #29254, #29236, #29223, #29222). All are same-repo branches (head.repo == base.repo = github/gh-aw), not forks. Per policy, only fork PRs are triaged. No fork PRs to triage.
